options.text: Can you also take a group photo with all of us?
Can you take a photo of just me?
How much does it cost to take a photo?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"Can you also take a group photo with all of us?"是因为它直接询问导游是否可以帮忙拍一张包含所有人的合照。其他选项不正确，因为"Can you take a photo of just me?"只要求拍自己，"Do you have a camera?"询问导游是否有相机，而"How much does it cost to take a photo?"询问拍照费用，都是不符合场景需求的提问。
content.scenarioHint: 游客请求导游帮忙拍照或合影

options.text: This view is amazing! Can you take a photo of me with the castle?
You are really good at photography. Can you take a selfie with me?
I love this place! Can you take a picture of the castle for me?
This is a great view. Can you take a picture of me and the castle together?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"This view is amazing! Can you take a photo of me with the castle?"是合适的提问，因为它表达了游客的请求并且语言自然。其他选项中，"You are really good at photography. Can you take a selfie with me?"不符合场景，因为游客并没有要求导游自拍"I love this place! Can you take a picture of the castle for me?"不符合场景，因为游客并没有要求导游只拍城堡"This is a great view. Can you take a picture of me and the castle together?"虽然表达了游客的需求，但语言不自然，正确答案更简洁直接
content.scenarioHint: 游客请求导游帮忙拍照或合影

options.text: Of course! I'll make sure you're in the center.
I'm not good with cameras, maybe you should use a tripod.
Can you take your own photo with your phone?

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应并承诺细节帮助（确保你在中心），体现体贴和专业。选项2推卸责任并建议对方自己解决，不符合求助情境；选项3和4缺乏同理心，未体现旅游场景中的互助精神。
content.speakerText: Hey, would you mind taking a photo of me by the fountain? I don't want to miss this moment.
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你能帮我在这喷泉边拍张照吗？我不想错过这一刻。
